title: A Wild Ultramarathon Appears
summary:
After leaving Valley of Fire, we spent the afternoon looking for campsites and failing. We finally found a busy spot just outside the Virgin River Gorge that had a few empty spots available. It turned out that the area was so busy because we were camped right next to the finish line of the the Grandmasters Ultramarathon, an ultramarathon that is exclusively for athletes over 50 years old. Since I had a run scheduled for that afternoon, I chatted with the race director and asked if it was ok to go cheer on runners on the course. I had a great run cheering on the runners and got very motivated to sign up for a race myself.

-Colin

photos.caption: Our camp spot for the night.
